hero.title: Birthday & Anniversary Reminder
hero.description: Remember birthdays, anniversaries, and meaningful dates with annual reminder tracking.

differences.title: A personal occasion memory
differences.description: The app keeps important annual occasions searchable, grouped, and visible before they arrive.

items.title: Annual reminders
items.description: Store the original event date and calculate the next yearly occurrence.

items.title: Gift ideas and notes
items.description: Keep useful context with each reminder.

items.title: Acknowledgement
items.description: Mark this year's reminder completed without losing next year's occurrence.

feel.title: Warm, practical, and prepared
feel.description: Birthday & Anniversary Reminder helps users prepare for meaningful dates without sending automatic messages.

items.title: Clear
items.description: Today, week, month, next 30 days, missed, and acknowledged views are separated.

items.title: Personal
items.description: Relationships, phone, email, gift ideas, and notes stay with each person.

items.title: Reusable
items.description: Annual calculations reset naturally for the next occurrence.

audiences.title: Who uses Birthday & Anniversary Reminder
audiences.description: The app supports people who want to remember important dates and prepare in advance.

items.title: Families
items.description: Track birthdays, child birthdays, and anniversaries.

items.title: Friends
items.description: Remember meaningful dates and gift ideas.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Track work anniversaries and graduation milestones.

resourceSection.title: Reminder essentials
resourceSection.description: A protected workspace for important annual occasions.

items.title: Reminder records
items.description: Create, edit, archive, restore, favourite, acknowledge, and delete reminders.

items.title: Occasion types
items.description: Use seeded types or add custom occasion groups.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review monthly distribution, favourites, upcoming reminders, and recently added records.

groupedSection.title: Prepare before important dates
groupedSection.description: The workflow moves from recordkeeping into timely review and acknowledgement.

items.name: Person
items.description: Store name, relationship, contact details, and notes.

items.name: Occasion
items.description: Choose birthday, anniversary, graduation, or custom type.

items.name: Upcoming
items.description: Track today, this week, this month, and next 30 days.

items.name: Complete
items.description: Acknowledge this year's reminder when handled.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with Ansiversa workflow standards
technicalSection.description: Birthday & Anniversary Reminder uses protected API-backed records and annual calculations from stored dates.
items: Overview CTA opens the real reminders workflow.
